name: Pasta with Roasted Peppers & Sausage
recipeIngredient: 2 large Red or yellow bell peppers, stemmed, seeded, and sliced
1/4 cup Balsamic vinegar or red wine vinegar
1 lb Penne or other tube pasta
recipeInstructions:
1. Place sausage, whole garlic, onion, and peppers in a 12x17-inch pan; pierce meat all over.
2. Bake in a 425°F oven until vegetables are limp and edges dark brown, about 1 hour. Stir often.
3. Thinly slice sausages; keep warm.
4. Cut garlic in half crosswise; squeeze the pulp into a bowl.
5. Add vinegar, mustard, and oregano; stir well.
6. Bring 3 quarts water to a boil in a 5-6 quart pan over high heat.
7. Add pasta; cook, uncovered, until just tender to bite, 8-10 minutes. Drain.
8. Pour drained pasta into a bowl.
9. Add sausage and garlic mixtures. Mix well.
10. Serve hot or at room temperature.
